intro.name: Raphael El Mouallem
intro.title: Software Engineer · Full Stack & AI Developer

about.bio: I'm a software engineer based in Lebanon, currently pursuing a Master's in Web Development. I build things across the stack — from React frontends and Spring Boot backends to PyTorch models trained from scratch. I like working on problems that sit at the intersection of systems, AI, and good design.

site.title: About This Site
site.description: This portfolio is a handbuilt 3D experience in React Three Fiber. You scroll, you fall. The sky is procedurally generated — stars, galaxies, cloud banks, and an underwater scene at the bottom, all in real time. No templates. Just scroll depth, geometry, and physics.

site.title: About This Site
site.description: A lightweight Japandi-aesthetic portfolio page — paper textures, ink tokens, procedural SVG motifs. Pure React, no 3D. Framer Motion for transitions, custom cursor, wind-streak generative art.

projects.title: Nexus
projects.subtitle: Enterprise RAG Knowledge System
projects.description: A RAG platform for AI-powered search across document repositories. Hybrid pipeline combining semantic vector search and lexical search, with local (Ollama) and cloud (Gemini) inference. Cross-platform — Angular web, Flutter mobile. Containerized with Docker.

projects.title: Custom GPT-2 mini
projects.subtitle: LLM from scratch in PyTorch
projects.description: Decoder-based LLM rebuilt from scratch — 12 self-attention heads, RoPE positional encoding. Optimised for Apple MPS via matrix fusion and bfloat16. Trained incrementally (6→8→12 heads). Fine-tuned on dialog datasets, quantized (PQT) for inference.

projects.title: E-Commerce
projects.subtitle: Full Stack Web App
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce with React + Tailwind frontend, Spring Boot backend with auth and clean architecture, PostgreSQL/Flyway database. User profiles, product ratings.

projects.title: Fitness App
projects.subtitle: Cross-Platform Mobile App
projects.description: Cross-platform fitness app in Flutter (web compatible). Multi-user support, anonymous mode, TTS workout guidance. Encrypted SQLite local storage. Dedicated pages for workouts, nutrition, and statistics.

projects.title: Finance Tracker
projects.subtitle: Budget & Expense Manager
projects.description: Responsive Angular app for expense tracking and budget categorization. Statistical dashboards, .xlsx transaction import. Django MVC backend, PostgreSQL storage.

contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.subheading: Open to opportunities, collaborations, and interesting problems.

footer.heading: You made it!
footer.subheading: That's everything — thanks for scrolling all the way down.
